title: phyllostegia knudsenii
intro: Phyllostegia knudsenii, also known as Kanaloa's or Kanaloa's hedge nettle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phyllostegia knudsenii are believed to include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, salves, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
